cross_repo_touches: company/legal/claim_register.md -- register missing pre-Sprint-2 accessors (list_players, is_setup_complete family, is_install_configured, check_request_token) so the audit runs clean on day one

agent/platform/{credentials,broker_connection,auth}.py -- add `# claim-exempt: <reason>` inline markers on internal helpers (encrypted_file_path, set_config_dir, set_encrypted_file_passphrase, is_keyring_available, force_fallback, reset_rate_limiter, constant_time_equal, RedactingFilter, install_redacting_filter). Documentation-only edits; no runtime behaviour changes.
notes: Stdlib only (ast, tokenize, re, argparse, pathlib, subprocess). No new dep. Cross-repo edits are documentation-grade (comment markers + register table rows) and safe because they change no code path. `# claim-exempt` markers are appended to existing def lines only; behaviour identical.
review_criteria: Audit exits 0 on current repo (invariant for CI)
Red-line SPARE_CLAIM case exits 1 with helpful diagnostic
Installer is idempotent and refuses to clobber foreign hooks
Every claim-exempt marker in agent/platform/*.py has a human-readable reason
